languages.text: "Вижу, вы уже приняли решение. Я не стану вас отговаривать".
"I can see you have already made your decision. I will not try to dissuade you."
languages.original_text: "Вижу, вы уже приняли решение. Я не стану вас отговаривать".

traits.locale_text: "I can see you have already made up your mind. I will not try to change it."
"I can see you have already made up your mind. I will not try to change it."
"I can see you have already made your decision. I will not try to dissuade you."
"I can see you have already made your decision. I will not try to dissuade you."

languages.text: "Ich sehe, Ihr habt Eure Entscheidung schon getroffen. Ich werde nicht versuchen, Euch umzustimmen."
languages.original_text: "I can see you have already made your decision. I will not try to dissuade you."

traits.locale_text: "Ich sehe, Ihr habt Eure Entscheidung schon getroffen. Ich werde nicht versuchen, Euch umzustimmen."

languages.text: « Je vois bien que votre décision est prise. Je ne vais pas chercher à vous faire changer d'avis. »
languages.original_text: "I can see you have already made your decision. I will not try to dissuade you."

traits.locale_text: « Je vois bien que votre décision est prise. Je ne vais pas chercher à vous faire changer d'avis. »

languages.text: «Veo que ya ha tomado la decisión. No intentaré disuadirle».
languages.original_text: "I can see you have already made your decision. I will not try to dissuade you."

traits.locale_text: «Veo que ya ha tomado la decisión. No intentaré disuadirle».

languages.text: "Görüyorum ki kararını çoktan vermişsin. Seni vazgeçirmeye çalışmayacağım."
languages.original_text: "I can see you have already made your decision. I will not try to dissuade you."

traits.locale_text: "Görüyorum ki kararını çoktan vermişsin. Seni vazgeçirmeye çalışmayacağım."

languages.text: “我看得出来你已经下定决心了。我不会再劝你。”
languages.original_text: "I can see you have already made your decision. I will not try to dissuade you."

traits.locale_text: “我看得出来你已经下定决心了。我不会再劝你。”

languages.text: 「あなたはすでに決断を下したようですね。私はあなたを説得しようとはしません。」
languages.original_text: "I can see you have already made your decision. I will not try to dissuade you."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたはすでに決断を下したようですね。私はあなたを説得しようとはしません。」
